case_title: STANTON W. JONES VS. COVENANT AVIATION SECURITY, LLC

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JONES, STANTON W. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COVENANT AVIATION SECURITY, LLC $4,300.00 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,360.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT COVENANT AVIATION SECURITY, LLC HEARING SET FOR FEB-24-2010 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-24-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-24-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PLAINTFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED ONLY. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-04-2009 - JUDGMENT.
DEFT'S REQUEST FOR DISMISSAL FILED BY DEFENDANT COVENANT AVIATION SECURITY, LLC

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-04-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-04-2009 BY JUDGE; MONICA RILEY, CLERK; MARJORIE SCHWARTZ-SCOTT, NOT REPORTED, APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,300.00 FILED BY JONES, STANTON W. AS TO DEFENDANT COVENANT AVIATION SECURITY, LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-04-2009 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF JONES, STANTON W. AS TO DEFENDANT COVENANT AVIATION SECURITY, LLC
COPYING FEES PAID BY PLAINTIFF JONES, STANTON W.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED OCT-28-2009, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT COVENANT AVIATION SECURITY, LLC
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF JONES, STANTON W.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT COVENANT AVIATION SECURITY, LLC

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY COVENANT AVIATION SECURITY, LLC IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT'S CHALLENGE TO VENUE IS GRANTED; PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF MAY FILE NEW CLAIM IN COURT OF PROPER VENUE. THE COURT DETERMINES THAT THE UNCONTESTED JUDGMENT SHOULD NOT HAVE BEEN ENTERED WHILE VENUE CHALLENGE WAS PENDING. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SALVIT.
